{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Skysworn practice arena
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Skysworn practice arena]] is a broad oval a hundred yards long and about fifty wide in the middle.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2">''Uncrowned'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
